title: SyncRepair
description: This Armor HUD allows you to see the durability of your armor and the amount of XP bottles you need to repair it, along with other useful features
body:
SyncRepair

Ever wondered when the perfect time is to repair your armor for maximum XP efficiency?

SyncRepair helps you optimize your armor repairs by checking the damage across all your Mending armor pieces and telling you exactly when to start mending.

Legality in Different Competitive PvP Tierlists

Check whether this mod is allowed in your competitive PvP environment:

| Gamemode | [**McTiers**](https://mctiers.com/) | [**PvPTiers**](https://pvptiers.com/) | [**SubTiers**](https://subtiers.net/) | | ------------------ | ----------------------------------- | ------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------- | | **SMP / DiaSMP** | Allowed | Allowed | Allowed | | **NethPot** | Not Allowed (in tests) | Not Allowed (in tests) | – | | **CPvP / DiaCPvP** | Unknown | Not Allowed (in tests) | Allowed | | **Mace** | – | Not Allowed (in tests) | – |

If your gamemode isn’t listed, check with your server’s staff or rulebook.

Personally, I find this mod most useful in non-RNG based XP bottle environments. It works the best in McTiers, but it works well in PvPTiers and SubTiers too!

FAQ

Does this conflict with other HUD mods?

Not directly, but if you use another ArmorHud, you might have to turn off features to avoid overlapping.

Does this mod work in different clients?

Of course it does!
